question: Should a finished website have lorem ipsum paragraphs?
context: Lorem Ipsum paragraphs are meant to be temporary.
Web designers always remove lorem ipsum paragraphs before launch.
response:
<reasoning>
Lorem Ipsum paragraphs are intended as placeholder text.
Web designers are instructed to remove lorem ipsum paragraphs before launching a website.
A finished website must be fully functional and visually complete.
Lores ipsum paragraphs are not part of the final content.
A finished website should not have lorem ipsum paragraphs.
<answer> No
